site.name: Morning Papers
site.tagline: 每天 8:00 自动更新的跨领域 Q1 / 顶刊论文速览
site.image_style: Kodak 5207, Kodak Gold 200, Cinestill 800T, cinematic editorial photography, warm grain, soft halation, natural light, no text
fortunes: Read one good thing and let it change the day.
Your attention is a quiet form of courage.
A clear idea likes an early morning.
The next sentence is already waiting.
Curiosity is luck you can practice.
Make the day slightly more intelligent than yesterday.
A good question is a lantern.
Let the useful thought find you halfway.
The train moves; so can the mind.
